section.title: AI Risks and Concerns
section.description: Please rate your level of concern for each of the following potential risks related to AI use in project management.

questions.text: Rate your level of concern for each risk factor:

rows.label: **Data sensitivity / confidentiality**
rows.description: Sharing sensitive project data with AI tools

rows.label: **Hallucinations / accuracy**
rows.description: AI providing incorrect or misleading information

rows.label: **Bias in prioritization**
rows.description: AI recommendations reflecting biased data or algorithms

rows.label: **Over-dependence on AI**
rows.description: Loss of critical thinking or human judgment

rows.label: **Compliance / regulatory issues**
rows.description: AI use not aligned with organizational or legal requirements
